---
title: "latlong_to_cartesian"
generated: true
description: "Latitude/longitude (radians) -> Cartesian `(x, y, z)` on a sphere."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.geometry.sphere`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:latlong_to_cartesian -->
```python
latlong_to_cartesian(latlong: Float[Array, '... 2'], r: float = 1.0) -> Float[Array, '... 3']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:latlong_to_cartesian -->
Latitude/longitude (radians) -> Cartesian `(x, y, z)` on a sphere.

Latitude is the angle from the equator (`-pi/2` at south pole,
`+pi/2` at north pole); longitude is the angle around the
equator from the prime meridian.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:latlong_to_cartesian -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `latlong` | `Float` | `...` Ă— `2` | â€” | Stacked `(latitude, longitude)` in radians, `(..., 2)`. |
| `r` | `float` | â€” | `1.0` | Radius of the sphere. |

**Returns** `Float` â€” shape `...` Ă— `3`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:latlong_to_cartesian -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks â€” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **102.1 Âµs** (median, L4); up to **7.82Ă— faster** than `numpy.latlong_to_cartesian`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_LATLONG_TO_CARTESIAN.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=16384 | `cupy.latlong_to_cartesian` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=16384 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 599.7 Âµs / 659.9 Âµs | 88.00 ms | 703 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00011Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=16384 | `numpy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 198.8 Âµs / 212.5 Âµs | 222.3 Âµs | 703 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00014Ă—tol | 0.33x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=16384 | `cupy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 140.0 Âµs / 148.5 Âµs | 47.31 ms | 0.13 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00016Ă—tol | 1.46x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=16384 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 95.9 Âµs / 102.1 Âµs | 172.42 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00016Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=16384 | `numpy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 194.3 Âµs / 197.1 Âµs | 226.3 Âµs | 0.13 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00014Ă—tol | 2.03x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `cupy.latlong_to_cartesian` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 72.2 Âµs / 74.7 Âµs | 72.40 ms | 703 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0001Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `numpy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 94.4 Âµs / 96.6 Âµs | 80.5 Âµs | 703 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00013Ă—tol | 1.31x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `cupy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 196.7 Âµs / 214.3 Âµs | 672.32 ms | 0.03 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00014Ă—tol | 2.17x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 90.7 Âµs / 97.5 Âµs | 183.38 ms | 0.13 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00014Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `numpy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 55.3 Âµs / 57.8 Âµs | 79.5 Âµs | 0.03 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00013Ă—tol | 0.61x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=65536 | `cupy.latlong_to_cartesian` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=65536 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.33 ms / 1.55 ms | 77.17 ms | 703 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00012Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cpu | n=65536 | `numpy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 806.9 Âµs / 827.6 Âµs | 895.2 Âµs | 703 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00015Ă—tol | 0.61x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=65536 | `cupy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 138.8 Âµs / 149.9 Âµs | 51.46 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00017Ă—tol | 1.47x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=65536 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 94.7 Âµs / 124.2 Âµs | 162.71 ms | 2.36 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00017Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| latlong_to_cartesian | jax-cuda12 | n=65536 | `numpy.latlong_to_cartesian` | ok | 740.4 Âµs / 751.5 Âµs | 770.8 Âµs | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00015Ă—tol | 7.82x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `143257d8` Â· nitrix `5d1717e0`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:latlong_to_cartesian -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `2` | *(undocumented â€” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `3` | *(undocumented â€” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
